instruction_packet_target.declared_goal: Placeholder mapping from a future compiled source into a bounded RTG observer-window instruction packet.

allowed_source_use: Show how a context-only source may be referenced by an instruction packet after review.
Preserve source posture and claim limits.
disallowed_source_use: Do not treat the placeholder as an imported paper.
Do not claim evidence support from the placeholder.
Do not use the placeholder to promote RTG beyond draft posture.
claim_limit: May claim only that a placeholder source-to-instruction mapping shape exists.
notes: Static placeholder only. No actual paper has been imported or mapped.
